description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.
examples:
Command Example
#
!jarm-fingerprint host="google.com" port=443
Context Example
#
{
"DBotScore"
:

outputs.description: FQDN of the host. JARM.IP IP Address of the host.
outputs.name: JARM.FQDN

outputs.description: TCP port JARM.Target The host in the format [IP or FQDN]:Port
outputs.name: JARM.Port

outputs.description: JARM fingerprint of the host. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: JARM.Fingerprint

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type
